call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car. 
Agent: Excellent! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Yeah, that's… that's pretty good. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed at 8.99%? 
Agent: Absolutely. Fixed for the life of the loan. So, to get this rolling, I just need to confirm a few details… your address is still Denver, Colorado? 
Eleanor: Yes, that's right. 
Agent: Perfect. And your employment is still with… Apex Corp? 
Eleanor: Yep. 
Agent: Wonderful. Okay, Eleanor, I'm going to send you a digital document to sign. It outlines everything we've discussed. Once signed, the funds will be deposited into your account within 24-48 hours. 
Eleanor: Sounds good. Thanks, Mark. 
Agent: You're very welcome! Have a great day.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Financial Freedom. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $2,500 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, this card offers… 
Robert: No, thank you. Don't call me again. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Secure Finance. I'm calling regarding a referral from GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, Mark mentioned something. I'm thinking about renovating my kitchen. 
Agent: Fantastic! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. The terms are very flexible. 
Jessica: 12.5%? That seems a little high. I was hoping for something lower. 
Agent: I understand. However, given your self-employment status, that's a very competitive rate. We do have options for a secured loan, but that requires collateral. 
Jessica: Hmm… I don't really want to put up collateral. What's the monthly payment like? 
Agent: Approximately $330 for 60 months. We also offer options for 36 or 48 months, which would increase the monthly payment but reduce the total interest paid. 
Jessica: Okay. And what about fees? 
Agent: There's a $300 origination fee, but no annual fees or prepayment penalties. 
Jessica: So, if I pay it off early, I don't get penalized? 
Agent: Exactly. You can pay it off at any time without incurring any extra charges. 
Jessica: Alright. Let me think about it. I need to compare with my bank. 
Agent: Absolutely. I can send you a detailed loan agreement outlining all the terms and conditions. Would you like that emailed to you? 
Jessica: Yes, please. That would be great. 
Agent: Wonderful. I'll send that over right away. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions. 
Jessica: Thanks, David.

Agent: Hello, Michael? This is Lisa from Premier Financial. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Oh, yeah, I did. Just looking at options. 
Agent: Great! We are pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card with a credit limit of $5,000 and an interest rate of 17.99%. It comes with rewards points on every purchase. 
Michael: 17.99% is… pretty high. I'm not sure. I've got a couple of cards already. 
Agent: I understand. But this card offers 2% cashback on all purchases, and no annual fee. 
Michael: Hmm. I'm really just trying to find something with a lower APR. I'm trying to build my credit. 
Agent: Well, we can explore options for a lower rate, but that would likely require a higher credit score. 
Michael: Yeah, I figured. I think I'll pass for now. Thanks anyway. 
Agent: Okay, Michael. If you change your mind, feel free to contact us. Have a good day.

Agent: Hello, Ms. Davis? This is Kevin calling from Universal Lending. We're offering a special… 
Patricia: (Interrupting) You guys called me yesterday! And the day before! I told you I'm not interested! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are pre-approving you for a $3,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 24.99%. 
Patricia: 24.99?! Are you trying to rob me? I'm on a fixed income! 
Agent: We… uh… we can discuss payment options… 
Patricia: No! I want my number removed from your list! This is harassment! Don't you dare call me again! *click*
